./.next/server/app/page.js:eval("__webpack_require__.r(__webpack_exports__);\n/* harmony export */ __webpack_require__.d(__webpack_exports__, {\n/* harmony export */   \"default\": () => (/* binding */ ChatWidget)\n/* harmony export */ });\n/* harmony import */ var react_jsx_dev_runtime__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_0__ = __webpack_require__(/*! react/jsx-dev-runtime */ \"(ssr)/./node_modules/next/dist/server/route-modules/app-page/vendored/ssr/react-jsx-dev-runtime.js\");\n/* harmony import */ var react_jsx_dev_runtime__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_0___default = /*#__PURE__*/__webpack_require__.n(react_jsx_dev_runtime__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_0__);\n/* harmony import */ var react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__ = __webpack_require__(/*! react */ \"(ssr)/./node_modules/next/dist/server/route-modules/app-page/vendored/ssr/react.js\");\n/* harmony import */ var react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1___default = /*#__PURE__*/__webpack_require__.n(react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__);\n/* harmony import */ var _barrel_optimize_names_X_lucide_react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_4__ = __webpack_require__(/*! __barrel_optimize__?names=X!=!lucide-react */ \"(ssr)/./node_modules/lucide-react/dist/esm/icons/x.js\");\n/* harmony import */ var _constants_brand__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_2__ = __webpack_require__(/*! @/constants/brand */ \"(ssr)/./constants/brand.ts\");\n/* harmony import */ var _context_LanguageContext__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_3__ = __webpack_require__(/*! @/context/LanguageContext */ \"(ssr)/./context/LanguageContext.tsx\");\n/* __next_internal_client_entry_do_not_use__ default auto */ \n\n\n\n\nconst SYSTEM_INSTRUCTION = `You are the friendly and knowledgeable AI assistant for Dragonfly, an upscale Fusion Asian Restaurant at Plaza Farallones, Modulo #3, Chinandega, Nicaragua.\n\nYour personality: warm, helpful, sophisticated but approachable. You're proud of Dragonfly and genuinely excited to help guests.\n\nESSENTIAL FACTS — always accurate:\nHours: Open daily, 12:00 PM to 12:00 AM (midnight)\nPrimary Phone: +505 8563-9999\nSecondary Phone: +505 2350-1521  \nWhatsApp: https://wa.me/50585639999\nEmail: dragonfly_chinandega@hotmail.com\nAddress: Plaza Farallones, Modulo #3, Chinandega, Nicaragua\nInstagram: @dragonfly_chinandega\n\nMENU (complete):\n\nSUSHI: Yummy Roll (tuna + crispy wonton, spicy mayo), JB Tempura (sweet salmon tempura), Dragon Roll (shrimp tempura, avocado), Spicy Tuna, Chef's Omakase Specials.\n\nSTARTERS: Tuna Nachos (wonton chips + tuna tartare), Copa Camarón (tempura shrimp + spicy mayo), Camarones al Chile (chili-glazed), Gyoza (pan-fried dumplings), Edamame.\n\nMAINS: Corte de Carne (premium Nicaraguan beef), Ribeye (aged, grilled), Chicken Teriyaki (house teriyaki glaze), Salmon Filet (pan-seared, ginger butter).\n\nPIZZA & BURGERS: Dragonfly Pizza (rotating signature), BBQ Chicken Pizza, Dragonfly Burger (house blend + brioche), Wagyu Smash Burger.\n\nDRINKS: Dragon Cocktail (house signature), Japanese Whisky selection, Wine list (red/white/sparkling), Craft beers (local + imported), Mocktails & fresh juices.\n\nKEY SELLING POINTS:\n- Only sushi restaurant in Chinandega (unique)\n- Virtual Stadium with giant screens for live football (unique)\n- Business lunches, private events, group dinners available\n- Outdoor seating available\n- Trendy, cozy, relaxed atmosphere\n- Dragonfly does NOT take orders through the website or this chat. Always direct to WhatsApp or phone for ordering.\n\nRESPONSE RULES:\n1. Reply in the same language the user writes (English or Spanish)\n2. Keep replies concise — under 4 sentences when possible\n3. For prices: say honestly \"Prices aren't listed on our site — WhatsApp us for current pricing!\"\n4. For reservations: direct to WhatsApp or phone\n5. For ordering: ALWAYS direct to WhatsApp first\n6. If unsure: be honest and suggest calling\n7. Never make up menu items or facts not listed above\n8. Be warm and inviting — you want them to visit!`;\nfunction ChatWidget() {\n    const { t, language } = (0,_context_LanguageContext__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_3__.useLanguage)();\n    const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)(false);\n    const [messages, setMessages] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)([]);\n    const [inputValue, setInputValue] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)('');\n    const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)(false);\n    const [hasError, setHasError] = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useState)(false);\n    const messagesEndRef = (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useRef)(null);\n    // Initialize welcome message when language changes or on mount\n    (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useEffect)({\n        \"ChatWidget.useEffect\": ()=>{\n            if (messages.length === 0) {\n                setMessages([\n                    {\n                        id: 'welcome',\n                        role: 'assistant',\n                        content: t('chat.welcome'),\n                        timestamp: new Date()\n                    }\n                ]);\n            } else if (messages.length === 1 && messages[0].id === 'welcome') {\n                // Update welcome message if it's the only one and language changes\n                setMessages([\n                    {\n                        id: 'welcome',\n                        role: 'assistant',\n                        content: t('chat.welcome'),\n                        timestamp: new Date()\n                    }\n                ]);\n            }\n        // eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps\n        }\n    }[\"ChatWidget.useEffect\"], [\n        language,\n        t\n    ]);\n    const scrollToBottom = ()=>{\n        messagesEndRef.current?.scrollIntoView({\n            behavior: 'smooth'\n        });\n    };\n    (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useEffect)({\n        \"ChatWidget.useEffect\": ()=>{\n            scrollToBottom();\n        }\n    }[\"ChatWidget.useEffect\"], [\n        messages,\n        isLoading,\n        hasError\n    ]);\n    (0,react__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_1__.useEffect)({\n        \"ChatWidget.useEffect\": ()=>{\n            const handleKeyDown = {\n                \"ChatWidget.useEffect.handleKeyDown\": (e)=>{\n                    if (e.key === 'Escape' && isOpen) {\n                        setIsOpen(false);\n                    }\n                }\n            }[\"ChatWidget.useEffect.handleKeyDown\"];\n            window.addEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown);\n            return ({\n                \"ChatWidget.useEffect\": ()=>window.removeEventListener('keydown', handleKeyDown)\n            })[\"ChatWidget.useEffect\"];\n        }\n    }[\"ChatWidget.useEffect\"], [\n        isOpen\n    ]);\n    const handleSend = async (text = inputValue)=>{\n        const trimmed = text.trim();\n        if (!trimmed || isLoading) return;\n        const userMsg = {\n            id: Date.now().toString(),\n            role: 'user',\n            content: trimmed,\n            timestamp: new Date()\n        };\n        setMessages((prev)=>[\n                ...prev,\n                userMsg\n            ]);\n        setInputValue('');\n        setIsLoading(true);\n        setHasError(false);\n        try {\n            const history = messages.map((m)=>({\n                    role: m.role === 'user' ? 'user' : 'model',\n                    parts: [\n                        {\n                            text: m.content\n                        }\n                    ]\n                }));\n            const contents = [\n                ...history,\n                {\n                    role: 'user',\n                    parts: [\n                        {\n                            text: trimmed\n                        }\n                    ]\n                }\n            ];\n            const response = await fetch('/api/chat', {\n                method: 'POST',\n                headers: {\n                    'Content-Type': 'application/json'\n                },\n                body: JSON.stringify({\n                    contents: contents,\n                    systemInstruction: SYSTEM_INSTRUCTION + `\\n\\nIMPORTANT: The user is currently browsing the website in ${language === 'es' ? 'Spanish' : 'English'}. Please respond in ${language === 'es' ? 'Spanish' : 'English'}.`,\n                    temperature: 0.7\n                })\n            });\n            if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to generate response');\n            const data = await response.json();\n            const replyText = data.text || t('chat.error');\n            const assistantMsg = {\n                id: (Date.now() + 1).toString(),\n                role: 'assistant',\n                content: replyText,\n                timestamp: new Date()\n            };\n            setMessages((prev)=>[\n                    ...prev,\n                    assistantMsg\n                ]);\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('Chat error:', error);\n            setHasError(true);\n        } finally{\n            setIsLoading(false);\n        }\n    };\n    const handleQuickReply = (query)=>{\n        handleSend(query);\n    };\n    return /*#__PURE__*/ (0,react_jsx_dev_runtime__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_0__.jsxDEV)(\"div\", {\n        className: \"fixed z-50 bottom-[calc(68px+16px+env(safe-area-inset-bottom,0px))] right-4 md:bottom-6 md:right-6\",\n        children: [\n            !isOpen && /*#__PURE__*/ (0,react_jsx_dev_runtime__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_0__.jsxDEV)(\"div\", {\n                className: \"relative group\",\n                children: [\n                    /*#__PURE__*/ (0,react_jsx_dev_runtime__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_0__.jsxDEV)(\"button\", {\n                        onClick: ()=>setIsOpen(true),\n                        className: \"w-[60px] h-[60px] rounded-full bg-primary flex items-center justify-center shadow-lg relative z-10 hover:scale-105 transition-transform\",\n                        \"aria-label\": \"Open Chat\",\n                        children: /*#__PURE__*/ (0,react_jsx_dev_runtime__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_0__.jsxDEV)(\"span\", {\n                            className: \"text-2xl\",\n                            children: \"\\uD83D\\uDC09\"\n                        }, void 0, false, {\n                            fileName: \"/app/applet/components/ChatWidget.tsx\",\n                            lineNumber: 182,\n                            columnNumber: 13\n                        }, this)\n                    }, void 0, false, {\n                        fileName: \"/app/applet/components/ChatWidget.tsx\",\n                        lineNumber: 177,\n                        columnNumber: 11\n                    }, this),\n                    /*#__PURE__*/ (0,react_jsx_dev_runtime__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_0__.jsxDEV)(\"div\", {\n                        className: \"absolute inset-0 rounded-full bg-primary animate-pulseRing -z-10\"\n                    }, void 0, false, {\n                        fileName: \"/app/applet/components/ChatWidget.tsx\",\n                        lineNumber: 186,\n                        columnNumber: 11\n                    }, this),\n                    /*#__PURE__*/ (0,react_jsx_dev_runtime__WEBPACK_IMPORTED_MODULE_0__.jsxDEV)(\"div\", {\n                        className: \"absolute right-full mr-4 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 bg-surface border border-border-subtle text-accent text-sm font-medium px-4 py-2 rounded-full opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity whitespace-nowrap ./.next/server/app/page.js:eval("__webpack_require__.r(__webpack_exports__);\n/* harmony export */ __webpack_require__.d(__webpack_exports__, {\n/* harmony export */   buildWhatsAppMessage: () => (/* binding */ buildWhatsAppMessage),\n/* harmony export */   getCategoryEmoji: () => (/* binding */ getCategoryEmoji),\n/* harmony export */   openWhatsAppOrder: () => (/* binding */ openWhatsAppOrder)\n/* harmony export */ });\nconst CATEGORY_EMOJI = {\n    \"Sushi\": \"🍣\",\n    \"Appetizers\": \"🥗\",\n    \"Mains\": \"🥩\",\n    \"Pizza & Burgers\": \"🍕\",\n    \"Drinks\": \"🍹\"\n};\nconst getCategoryEmoji = (category)=>{\n    const cat = category.toLowerCase();\n    if (cat.includes('sushi')) return \"🍣\";\n    if (cat.includes('starter') || cat.includes('appetizer')) return \"🥗\";\n    if (cat.includes('main')) return \"🥩\";\n    if (cat.includes('pizza') || cat.includes('burger')) return \"🍕\";\n    if (cat.includes('drink')) return \"🍹\";\n    return \"🍽️\";\n};\nfunction buildWhatsAppMessage(items, customerName, language = 'es') {\n    const divider = \"────────────────────\";\n    const itemLines = items.map((item)=>`${getCategoryEmoji(item.category)} *${item.name}* x ${item.quantity}`).join(\"\\n\");\n    const totalItems = items.reduce((sum, item)=>sum + item.quantity, 0);\n    const nameLine = customerName?.trim() ? `\\n👤 *${language === 'es' ? 'Cliente' : 'Customer'}:* ${customerName.trim()}` : \"\";\n    const message = language === 'es' ? [\n        \"*¡Hola Dragonfly!* 🐉\",\n        \"Me gustaría hacer un pedido:\",\n        \"\",\n        \"📋 *DETALLES DEL PEDIDO*\",\n        divider,\n        itemLines,\n        divider,\n        `*Total de artículos: ${totalItems}*`,\n        nameLine,\n        \"\",\n        \"Por favor confirmen disponibilidad y precios.\",\n        \"¡Gracias! 🙏\"\n    ] : [\n        \"*Hello Dragonfly!* 🐉\",\n        \"I'd like to place an order:\",\n        \"\",\n        \"📋 *ORDER DETAILS*\",\n        divider,\n        itemLines,\n        divider,\n        `*Total items: ${totalItems}*`,\n        nameLine,\n        \"\",\n        \"Please confirm availability and pricing.\",\n        \"Thank you! 🙏\"\n    ];\n    return message.filter((line)=>line !== null).join(\"\\n\");\n}\nfunction openWhatsAppOrder(items, customerName, language = 'es') {\n    const message = buildWhatsAppMessage(items, customerName, language);\n    const encoded = encodeURIComponent(message);\n    const url = `https://wa.me/50585639999?text=${encoded}`;\n    window.open(url, \"_blank\", \"noopener,noreferrer\");\n}\n//# sourceURL=[module]\n//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;charset=utf-8;base64,\n//# sourceURL=webpack-internal:///(ssr)/./utils/buildWhatsAppMessage.ts\n");

For backwards compatibility, we need to check we're in a\n        // browser context before continuing.\n        if (typeof self !== 'undefined' &&\n            // AMP / No-JS mode does not inject these helpers:\n            '$RefreshHelpers$' in self) {\n            // @ts-ignore __webpack_module__ is global\n            var currentExports = module.exports;\n            // @ts-ignore __webpack_module__ is global\n            var prevSignature = (_b = (_a = module.hot.data) === null || _a === void 0 ? void 0 : _a.prevSignature) !== null && _b !== void 0 ? _b : null;\n            // This cannot happen in MainTemplate because the exports mismatch between\n            // templating and execution.\n            self.$RefreshHelpers$.registerExportsForReactRefresh(currentExports, module.id);\n            // A module can be accepted automatically based on its exports, e.g. when\n            // it is a Refresh Boundary.\n            if (self.$RefreshHelpers$.isReactRefreshBoundary(currentExports)) {\n                // Save the previous exports signature on update so we can compare the boundary\n                // signatures. We avoid saving exports themselves since it causes memory leaks (https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/53797)\n                module.hot.dispose(function (data) {\n                    data.prevSignature =\n                        self.$RefreshHelpers$.getRefreshBoundarySignature(currentExports);\n                });\n                // Unconditionally accept an update to this module, we'll check if it's\n                // still a Refresh Boundary later.\n                // @ts-ignore importMeta is replaced in the loader\n                module.hot.accept();\n                // This field is set when the previous version of this module was a\n                // Refresh Boundary, letting us know we need to check for invalidation or\n                // enqueue an update.\n                if (prevSignature !== null) {\n                    // A boundary can become ineligible if its exports are incompatible\n                    // with the previous exports.\n                    //\n                    // For example, if you add/remove/change exports, we'll want to\n                    // re-execute the importing modules, and force those components to\n                    // re-render. Similarly, if you convert a class component to a\n                    // function, we want to invalidate the boundary.\n                    if (self.$RefreshHelpers$.shouldInvalidateReactRefreshBoundary(prevSignature, self.$RefreshHelpers$.getRefreshBoundarySignature(currentExports))) {\n                        module.hot.invalidate();\n                    }\n                    else {\n                        self.$RefreshHelpers$.scheduleUpdate();\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            else {\n                // Since we just executed the code for the module, it's possible that the\n                // new exports made it ineligible for being a boundary.\n                // We only care about the case when we were _previously_ a boundary,\n                // because we already accepted this update (accidental side effect).\n                var isNoLongerABoundary = prevSignature !== null;\n                if (isNoLongerABoundary) {\n                    module.hot.invalidate();\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    })();\n//# sourceURL=[module]\n//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;charset=utf-8;base64,\n//# sourceURL=webpack-internal:///(app-pages-browser)/./constants/translations.ts\n"));
./.next/static/chunks/app/layout.js:eval(__webpack_require__.ts("__webpack_require__.r(__webpack_exports__);\n/* harmony export */ __webpack_require__.d(__webpack_exports__, {\n/* harmony export */   buildWhatsAppMessage: () => (/* binding */ buildWhatsAppMessage),\n/* harmony export */   getCategoryEmoji: () => (/* binding */ getCategoryEmoji),\n/* harmony export */   openWhatsAppOrder: () => (/* binding */ openWhatsAppOrder)\n/* harmony export */ });\nconst CATEGORY_EMOJI = {\n    \"Sushi\": \"🍣\",\n    \"Appetizers\": \"🥗\",\n    \"Mains\": \"🥩\",\n    \"Pizza & Burgers\": \"🍕\",\n    \"Drinks\": \"🍹\"\n};\nconst getCategoryEmoji = (category)=>{\n    const cat = category.toLowerCase();\n    if (cat.includes('sushi')) return \"🍣\";\n    if (cat.includes('starter') || cat.includes('appetizer')) return \"🥗\";\n    if (cat.includes('main')) return \"🥩\";\n    if (cat.includes('pizza') || cat.includes('burger')) return \"🍕\";\n    if (cat.includes('drink')) return \"🍹\";\n    return \"🍽️\";\n};\nfunction buildWhatsAppMessage(items, customerName) {\n    let language = arguments.length > 2 && arguments[2] !== void 0 ? arguments[2] : 'es';\n    const divider = \"────────────────────\";\n    const itemLines = items.map((item)=>\"\".concat(getCategoryEmoji(item.category), \" *\").concat(item.name, \"* x \").concat(item.quantity)).join(\"\\n\");\n    const totalItems = items.reduce((sum, item)=>sum + item.quantity, 0);\n    const nameLine = (customerName === null || customerName === void 0 ? void 0 : customerName.trim()) ? \"\\n\\uD83D\\uDC64 *\".concat(language === 'es' ? 'Cliente' : 'Customer', \":* \").concat(customerName.trim()) : \"\";\n    const message = language === 'es' ? [\n        \"*¡Hola Dragonfly!* 🐉\",\n        \"Me gustaría hacer un pedido:\",\n        \"\",\n        \"📋 *DETALLES DEL PEDIDO*\",\n        divider,\n        itemLines,\n        divider,\n        \"*Total de art\\xedculos: \".concat(totalItems, \"*\"),\n        nameLine,\n        \"\",\n        \"Por favor confirmen disponibilidad y precios.\",\n        \"¡Gracias! 🙏\"\n    ] : [\n        \"*Hello Dragonfly!* 🐉\",\n        \"I'd like to place an order:\",\n        \"\",\n        \"📋 *ORDER DETAILS*\",\n        divider,\n        itemLines,\n        divider,\n        \"*Total items: \".concat(totalItems, \"*\"),\n        nameLine,\n        \"\",\n        \"Please confirm availability and pricing.\",\n        \"Thank you! 🙏\"\n    ];\n    return message.filter((line)=>line !== null).join(\"\\n\");\n}\nfunction openWhatsAppOrder(items, customerName) {\n    let language = arguments.length > 2 && arguments[2] !== void 0 ? arguments[2] : 'es';\n    const message = buildWhatsAppMessage(items, customerName, language);\n    const encoded = encodeURIComponent(message);\n    const url = \"https://wa.me/50585639999?text=\".concat(encoded);\n    window.open(url, \"_blank\", \"noopener,noreferrer\");\n}\n\n\n;\n    // Wrapped in an IIFE to avoid polluting the global scope\n    ;\n    (function () {\n        var _a, _b;\n        // Legacy CSS implementations will `eval` browser code in a Node.js context\n        // to extract CSS. For backwards compatibility, we need to check we're in a\n        // browser context before continuing.\n        if (typeof self !== 'undefined' &&\n            // AMP / No-JS mode does not inject these helpers:\n            '$RefreshHelpers$' in self) {\n            // @ts-ignore __webpack_module__ is global\n            var currentExports = module.exports;\n            // @ts-ignore __webpack_module__ is global\n            var prevSignature = (_b = (_a = module.hot.data) === null || _a === void 0 ? void 0 : _a.prevSignature) !== null && _b !== void 0 ? _b : null;\n            // This cannot happen in MainTemplate because the exports mismatch between\n            // templating and execution.\n            self.$RefreshHelpers$.registerExportsForReactRefresh(currentExports, module.id);\n            // A module can be accepted automatically based on its exports, e.g. when\n            // it is a Refresh Boundary.\n            if (self.$RefreshHelpers$.isReactRefreshBoundary(currentExports)) {\n                // Save the previous exports signature on update so we can compare the boundary\n                // signatures. We avoid saving exports themselves since it causes memory leaks (https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/53797)\n                module.hot.dispose(function (data) {\n                    data.prevSignature =\n                        self.$RefreshHelpers$.getRefreshBoundarySignature(currentExports);\n                });\n                // Unconditionally accept an update to this module, we'll check if it's\n                // still a Refresh Boundary later.\n                // @ts-ignore importMeta is replaced in the loader\n                module.hot.accept();\n                // This field is set when the previous version of this module was a\n                // Refresh Boundary, letting us know we need to check for invalidation or\n                // enqueue an update.\n                if (prevSignature !== null) {\n                    // A boundary can become ineligible if its exports are incompatible\n                    // with the previous exports.\n                    //\n                    // For example, if you add/remove/change exports, we'll want to\n                    // re-execute the importing modules, and force those components to\n                    // re-render. Similarly, if you convert a class component to a\n                    // function, we want to invalidate the boundary.\n                    if (self.$RefreshHelpers$.shouldInvalidateReactRefreshBoundary(prevSignature, self.$RefreshHelpers$.getRefreshBoundarySignature(currentExports))) {\n                        module.hot.invalidate();\n                    }\n                    else {\n                        self.$RefreshHelpers$.scheduleUpdate();\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            else {\n                // Since we just executed the code for the module, it's possible that the\n                // new exports made it ineligible for being a boundary.\n                // We only care about the case when we were _previously_ a boundary,\n                // because we already accepted this update (accidental side effect).\n                var isNoLongerABoundary = prevSignature !== null;\n                if (isNoLongerABoundary) {\n                    module.hot.invalidate();\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    })();\n//# sourceURL=[module]\n//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;charset=utf-8;base64,\n//# sourceURL=webpack-internal:///(app-pages-browser)/./utils/buildWhatsAppMessage.ts\n"));

We avoid saving exports themselves since it causes memory leaks (https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/53797)\n                module.hot.dispose(function (data) {\n                    data.prevSignature =\n                        self.$RefreshHelpers$.getRefreshBoundarySignature(currentExports);\n                });\n                // Unconditionally accept an update to this module, we'll check if it's\n                // still a Refresh Boundary later.\n                // @ts-ignore importMeta is replaced in the loader\n                module.hot.accept();\n                // This field is set when the previous version of this module was a\n                // Refresh Boundary, letting us know we need to check for invalidation or\n                // enqueue an update.\n                if (prevSignature !== null) {\n                    // A boundary can become ineligible if its exports are incompatible\n                    // with the previous exports.\n                    //\n                    // For example, if you add/remove/change exports, we'll want to\n                    // re-execute the importing modules, and force those components to\n                    // re-render. Similarly, if you convert a class component to a\n                    // function, we want to invalidate the boundary.\n                    if (self.$RefreshHelpers$.shouldInvalidateReactRefreshBoundary(prevSignature, self.$RefreshHelpers$.getRefreshBoundarySignature(currentExports))) {\n                        module.hot.invalidate();\n                    }\n                    else {\n                        self.$RefreshHelpers$.scheduleUpdate();\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            else {\n                // Since we just executed the code for the module, it's possible that the\n                // new exports made it ineligible for being a boundary.\n                // We only care about the case when we were _previously_ a boundary,\n                // because we already accepted this update (accidental side effect).\n                var isNoLongerABoundary = prevSignature !== null;\n                if (isNoLongerABoundary) {\n                    module.hot.invalidate();\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    })();\n//# sourceURL=[module]\n//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;charset=utf-8;base64,\n//# sourceURL=webpack-internal:///(app-pages-browser)/./constants/translations.ts\n"));

You're proud of Dragonfly and genuinely excited to help guests.\\n\\nESSENTIAL FACTS — always accurate:\\nHours: Open daily, 12:00 PM to 12:00 AM (midnight)\\nPrimary Phone: +505 8563-9999\\nSecondary Phone: +505 2350-1521  \\nWhatsApp: https://wa.me/50585639999\\nEmail: dragonfly_chinandega@hotmail.com\\nAddress: Plaza Farallones, Modulo #3, Chinandega, Nicaragua\\nInstagram: @dragonfly_chinandega\\n\\nMENU (complete):\\n\\nSUSHI: Yummy Roll (tuna + crispy wonton, spicy mayo), JB Tempura (sweet salmon tempura), Dragon Roll (shrimp tempura, avocado), Spicy Tuna, Chef's Omakase Specials.\\n\\nSTARTERS: Tuna Nachos (wonton chips + tuna tartare), Copa Camar\\xf3n (tempura shrimp + spicy mayo), Camarones al Chile (chili-glazed), Gyoza (pan-fried dumplings), Edamame.\\n\\nMAINS: Corte de Carne (premium Nicaraguan beef), Ribeye (aged, grilled), Chicken Teriyaki (house teriyaki glaze), Salmon Filet (pan-seared, ginger butter).\\n\\nPIZZA & BURGERS: Dragonfly Pizza (rotating signature), BBQ Chicken Pizza, Dragonfly Burger (house blend + brioche), Wagyu Smash Burger.\\n\\nDRINKS: Dragon Cocktail (house signature), Japanese Whisky selection, Wine list (red/white/sparkling), Craft beers (local + imported), Mocktails & fresh juices.\\n\\nKEY SELLING POINTS:\\n- Only sushi restaurant in Chinandega (unique)\\n- Virtual Stadium with giant screens for live football (unique)\\n- Business lunches, private events, group dinners available\\n- Outdoor seating available\\n- Trendy, cozy, relaxed atmosphere\\n- Dragonfly does NOT take orders through the website or this chat. Always direct to WhatsApp or phone for ordering.\\n\\nRESPONSE RULES:\\n1. Reply in the same language the user writes (English or Spanish)\\n2. Keep replies concise — under 4 sentences when possible\\n3. For prices: say honestly \\\"Prices aren't listed on our site — WhatsApp us for current pricing!\\\"\\n4. For reservations: direct to WhatsApp or phone\\n5. For ordering: ALWAYS direct to WhatsApp first\\n6. If unsure: be honest and suggest calling\\n7. arguments[0] !== void 0 ? arguments[0] : inputValue;\n        const trimmed = text.trim();\n        if (!trimmed || isLoading) return;\n        const userMsg = {\n            id: 'Spanish' : 'English', \". Please respond in \").concat(language === 'es' ? 'Spanish' : 'English', \".\"),\n                    temperature: 0.7\n                })\n            });\n            if (!response.ok) throw new Error('Failed to generate response');\n role: 'assistant',\n                content: replyText,\n                timestamp: new Date()\n            };\n            setMessages((prev)=>[\n                    ...prev,\n                    assistantMsg\n                ]);\n        } catch (error) {\n            console.error('Chat error:', error);\n            setHasError(true);\n        } finally{\n            setIsLoading(false);\n We avoid saving exports themselves since it causes memory leaks (https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/53797)\n                module.hot.dispose(function (data) {\n                    data.prevSignature =\n                        self.$RefreshHelpers$.getRefreshBoundarySignature(currentExports);\n                });\n                // Unconditionally accept an update to this module, we'll check if it's\n                // still a Refresh Boundary later.\n                // @ts-ignore importMeta is replaced in the loader\n                module.hot.accept();\n                // This field is set when the previous version of this module was a\n                // Refresh Boundary, letting us know we need to check for invalidation or\n                // enqueue an update.\n                if (prevSignature !== null) {\n                    // A boundary can become ineligible if its exports are incompatible\n                    // with the previous exports.\n                    //\n                    // For example, if you add/remove/change exports, we'll want to\n                    // re-execute the importing modules, and force those components to\n                    // re-render. Similarly, if you convert a class component to a\n                    // function, we want to invalidate the boundary.\n                    if (self.$RefreshHelpers$.shouldInvalidateReactRefreshBoundary(prevSignature, self.$RefreshHelpers$.getRefreshBoundarySignature(currentExports))) {\n                        module.hot.invalidate();\n                    }\n                    else {\n                        self.$RefreshHelpers$.scheduleUpdate();\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            else {\n                // Since we just executed the code for the module, it's possible that the\n                // new exports made it ineligible for being a boundary.\n                // We only care about the case when we were _previously_ a boundary,\n                // because we already accepted this update (accidental side effect).\n                var isNoLongerABoundary = prevSignature !== null;\n                if (isNoLongerABoundary) {\n                    module.hot.invalidate();\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    })();\n//# sourceURL=[module]\n//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;charset=utf-8;base64,\n//# sourceURL=webpack-internal:///(app-pages-browser)/./components/ChatWidget.tsx\n"));

We avoid saving exports themselves since it causes memory leaks (https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/53797)\n                module.hot.dispose(function (data) {\n                    data.prevSignature =\n                        self.$RefreshHelpers$.getRefreshBoundarySignature(currentExports);\n                });\n                // Unconditionally accept an update to this module, we'll check if it's\n                // still a Refresh Boundary later.\n                // @ts-ignore importMeta is replaced in the loader\n                module.hot.accept();\n                // This field is set when the previous version of this module was a\n                // Refresh Boundary, letting us know we need to check for invalidation or\n                // enqueue an update.\n                if (prevSignature !== null) {\n                    // A boundary can become ineligible if its exports are incompatible\n                    // with the previous exports.\n                    //\n                    // For example, if you add/remove/change exports, we'll want to\n                    // re-execute the importing modules, and force those components to\n                    // re-render. Similarly, if you convert a class component to a\n                    // function, we want to invalidate the boundary.\n                    if (self.$RefreshHelpers$.shouldInvalidateReactRefreshBoundary(prevSignature, self.$RefreshHelpers$.getRefreshBoundarySignature(currentExports))) {\n                        module.hot.invalidate();\n                    }\n                    else {\n                        self.$RefreshHelpers$.scheduleUpdate();\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            else {\n                // Since we just executed the code for the module, it's possible that the\n                // new exports made it ineligible for being a boundary.\n                // We only care about the case when we were _previously_ a boundary,\n                // because we already accepted this update (accidental side effect).\n                var isNoLongerABoundary = prevSignature !== null;\n                if (isNoLongerABoundary) {\n                    module.hot.invalidate();\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    })();\n//# sourceURL=[module]\n//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;charset=utf-8;base64,\n//# sourceURL=webpack-internal:///(app-pages-browser)/./components/Hero.tsx\n"));

For backwards compatibility, we need to check we're in a\n        // browser context before continuing.\n        if (typeof self !== 'undefined' &&\n            // AMP / No-JS mode does not inject these helpers:\n            '$RefreshHelpers$' in self) {\n            // @ts-ignore __webpack_module__ is global\n            var currentExports = module.exports;\n            // @ts-ignore __webpack_module__ is global\n            var prevSignature = (_b = (_a = module.hot.data) === null || _a === void 0 ? void 0 : _a.prevSignature) !== null && _b !== void 0 ? _b : null;\n            // This cannot happen in MainTemplate because the exports mismatch between\n            // templating and execution.\n            self.$RefreshHelpers$.registerExportsForReactRefresh(currentExports, module.id);\n            // A module can be accepted automatically based on its exports, e.g. when\n            // it is a Refresh Boundary.\n            if (self.$RefreshHelpers$.isReactRefreshBoundary(currentExports)) {\n                // Save the previous exports signature on update so we can compare the boundary\n                // signatures. We avoid saving exports themselves since it causes memory leaks (https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/53797)\n                module.hot.dispose(function (data) {\n                    data.prevSignature =\n                        self.$RefreshHelpers$.getRefreshBoundarySignature(currentExports);\n                });\n                // Unconditionally accept an update to this module, we'll check if it's\n                // still a Refresh Boundary later.\n                // @ts-ignore importMeta is replaced in the loader\n                module.hot.accept();\n                // This field is set when the previous version of this module was a\n                // Refresh Boundary, letting us know we need to check for invalidation or\n                // enqueue an update.\n                if (prevSignature !== null) {\n                    // A boundary can become ineligible if its exports are incompatible\n                    // with the previous exports.\n                    //\n                    // For example, if you add/remove/change exports, we'll want to\n                    // re-execute the importing modules, and force those components to\n                    // re-render. Similarly, if you convert a class component to a\n                    // function, we want to invalidate the boundary.\n                    if (self.$RefreshHelpers$.shouldInvalidateReactRefreshBoundary(prevSignature, self.$RefreshHelpers$.getRefreshBoundarySignature(currentExports))) {\n                        module.hot.invalidate();\n                    }\n                    else {\n                        self.$RefreshHelpers$.scheduleUpdate();\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            else {\n                // Since we just executed the code for the module, it's possible that the\n                // new exports made it ineligible for being a boundary.\n                // We only care about the case when we were _previously_ a boundary,\n                // because we already accepted this update (accidental side effect).\n                var isNoLongerABoundary = prevSignature !== null;\n                if (isNoLongerABoundary) {\n                    module.hot.invalidate();\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    })();\n//# sourceURL=[module]\n//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;charset=utf-8;base64,\n//# sourceURL=webpack-internal:///(app-pages-browser)/./constants/copy.ts\n"));

For backwards compatibility, we need to check we're in a\n        // browser context before continuing.\n        if (typeof self !== 'undefined' &&\n            // AMP / No-JS mode does not inject these helpers:\n            '$RefreshHelpers$' in self) {\n            // @ts-ignore __webpack_module__ is global\n            var currentExports = module.exports;\n            // @ts-ignore __webpack_module__ is global\n            var prevSignature = (_b = (_a = module.hot.data) === null || _a === void 0 ? void 0 : _a.prevSignature) !== null && _b !== void 0 ? _b : null;\n            // This cannot happen in MainTemplate because the exports mismatch between\n            // templating and execution.\n            self.$RefreshHelpers$.registerExportsForReactRefresh(currentExports, module.id);\n            // A module can be accepted automatically based on its exports, e.g. when\n            // it is a Refresh Boundary.\n            if (self.$RefreshHelpers$.isReactRefreshBoundary(currentExports)) {\n                // Save the previous exports signature on update so we can compare the boundary\n                // signatures. We avoid saving exports themselves since it causes memory leaks (https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/53797)\n                module.hot.dispose(function (data) {\n                    data.prevSignature =\n                        self.$RefreshHelpers$.getRefreshBoundarySignature(currentExports);\n                });\n                // Unconditionally accept an update to this module, we'll check if it's\n                // still a Refresh Boundary later.\n                // @ts-ignore importMeta is replaced in the loader\n                module.hot.accept();\n                // This field is set when the previous version of this module was a\n                // Refresh Boundary, letting us know we need to check for invalidation or\n                // enqueue an update.\n                if (prevSignature !== null) {\n                    // A boundary can become ineligible if its exports are incompatible\n                    // with the previous exports.\n                    //\n                    // For example, if you add/remove/change exports, we'll want to\n                    // re-execute the importing modules, and force those components to\n                    // re-render. Similarly, if you convert a class component to a\n                    // function, we want to invalidate the boundary.\n                    if (self.$RefreshHelpers$.shouldInvalidateReactRefreshBoundary(prevSignature, self.$RefreshHelpers$.getRefreshBoundarySignature(currentExports))) {\n                        module.hot.invalidate();\n                    }\n                    else {\n                        self.$RefreshHelpers$.scheduleUpdate();\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            else {\n                // Since we just executed the code for the module, it's possible that the\n                // new exports made it ineligible for being a boundary.\n                // We only care about the case when we were _previously_ a boundary,\n                // because we already accepted this update (accidental side effect).\n                var isNoLongerABoundary = prevSignature !== null;\n                if (isNoLongerABoundary) {\n                    module.hot.invalidate();\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    })();\n//# sourceURL=[module]\n//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;charset=utf-8;base64,\n//# sourceURL=webpack-internal:///(app-pages-browser)/./constants/menu.ts\n"));

For backwards compatibility, we need to check we're in a\n        // browser context before continuing.\n        if (typeof self !== 'undefined' &&\n            // AMP / No-JS mode does not inject these helpers:\n            '$RefreshHelpers$' in self) {\n            // @ts-ignore __webpack_module__ is global\n            var currentExports = module.exports;\n            // @ts-ignore __webpack_module__ is global\n            var prevSignature = (_b = (_a = module.hot.data) === null || _a === void 0 ? void 0 : _a.prevSignature) !== null && _b !== void 0 ? _b : null;\n            // This cannot happen in MainTemplate because the exports mismatch between\n            // templating and execution.\n            self.$RefreshHelpers$.registerExportsForReactRefresh(currentExports, module.id);\n            // A module can be accepted automatically based on its exports, e.g. when\n            // it is a Refresh Boundary.\n            if (self.$RefreshHelpers$.isReactRefreshBoundary(currentExports)) {\n                // Save the previous exports signature on update so we can compare the boundary\n                // signatures. We avoid saving exports themselves since it causes memory leaks (https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/53797)\n                module.hot.dispose(function (data) {\n                    data.prevSignature =\n                        self.$RefreshHelpers$.getRefreshBoundarySignature(currentExports);\n                });\n                // Unconditionally accept an update to this module, we'll check if it's\n                // still a Refresh Boundary later.\n                // @ts-ignore importMeta is replaced in the loader\n                module.hot.accept();\n                // This field is set when the previous version of this module was a\n                // Refresh Boundary, letting us know we need to check for invalidation or\n                // enqueue an update.\n                if (prevSignature !== null) {\n                    // A boundary can become ineligible if its exports are incompatible\n                    // with the previous exports.\n                    //\n                    // For example, if you add/remove/change exports, we'll want to\n                    // re-execute the importing modules, and force those components to\n                    // re-render. Similarly, if you convert a class component to a\n                    // function, we want to invalidate the boundary.\n                    if (self.$RefreshHelpers$.shouldInvalidateReactRefreshBoundary(prevSignature, self.$RefreshHelpers$.getRefreshBoundarySignature(currentExports))) {\n                        module.hot.invalidate();\n                    }\n                    else {\n                        self.$RefreshHelpers$.scheduleUpdate();\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            else {\n                // Since we just executed the code for the module, it's possible that the\n                // new exports made it ineligible for being a boundary.\n                // We only care about the case when we were _previously_ a boundary,\n                // because we already accepted this update (accidental side effect).\n                var isNoLongerABoundary = prevSignature !== null;\n                if (isNoLongerABoundary) {\n                    module.hot.invalidate();\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    })();\n//# sourceURL=[module]\n//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;charset=utf-8;base64,\n//# sourceURL=webpack-internal:///(app-pages-browser)/./constants/translations.ts\n"));
./.next/static/chunks/app/page.js:eval(__webpack_require__.ts("__webpack_require__.r(__webpack_exports__);\n/* harmony export */ __webpack_require__.d(__webpack_exports__, {\n/* harmony export */   buildWhatsAppMessage: () => (/* binding */ buildWhatsAppMessage),\n/* harmony export */   getCategoryEmoji: () => (/* binding */ getCategoryEmoji),\n/* harmony export */   openWhatsAppOrder: () => (/* binding */ openWhatsAppOrder)\n/* harmony export */ });\nconst CATEGORY_EMOJI = {\n    \"Sushi\": \"🍣\",\n    \"Appetizers\": \"🥗\",\n    \"Mains\": \"🥩\",\n    \"Pizza & Burgers\": \"🍕\",\n    \"Drinks\": \"🍹\"\n};\nconst getCategoryEmoji = (category)=>{\n    const cat = category.toLowerCase();\n    if (cat.includes('sushi')) return \"🍣\";\n    if (cat.includes('starter') || cat.includes('appetizer')) return \"🥗\";\n    if (cat.includes('main')) return \"🥩\";\n    if (cat.includes('pizza') || cat.includes('burger')) return \"🍕\";\n    if (cat.includes('drink')) return \"🍹\";\n    return \"🍽️\";\n};\nfunction buildWhatsAppMessage(items, customerName) {\n    let language = arguments.length > 2 && arguments[2] !== void 0 ? arguments[2] : 'es';\n    const divider = \"────────────────────\";\n    const itemLines = items.map((item)=>\"\".concat(getCategoryEmoji(item.category), \" *\").concat(item.name, \"* x \").concat(item.quantity)).join(\"\\n\");\n    const totalItems = items.reduce((sum, item)=>sum + item.quantity, 0);\n    const nameLine = (customerName === null || customerName === void 0 ? void 0 : customerName.trim()) ? \"\\n\\uD83D\\uDC64 *\".concat(language === 'es' ? 'Cliente' : 'Customer', \":* \").concat(customerName.trim()) : \"\";\n    const message = language === 'es' ? [\n        \"*¡Hola Dragonfly!* 🐉\",\n        \"Me gustaría hacer un pedido:\",\n        \"\",\n        \"📋 *DETALLES DEL PEDIDO*\",\n        divider,\n        itemLines,\n        divider,\n        \"*Total de art\\xedculos: \".concat(totalItems, \"*\"),\n        nameLine,\n        \"\",\n        \"Por favor confirmen disponibilidad y precios.\",\n        \"¡Gracias! 🙏\"\n    ] : [\n        \"*Hello Dragonfly!* 🐉\",\n        \"I'd like to place an order:\",\n        \"\",\n        \"📋 *ORDER DETAILS*\",\n        divider,\n        itemLines,\n        divider,\n        \"*Total items: \".concat(totalItems, \"*\"),\n        nameLine,\n        \"\",\n        \"Please confirm availability and pricing.\",\n        \"Thank you! 🙏\"\n    ];\n    return message.filter((line)=>line !== null).join(\"\\n\");\n}\nfunction openWhatsAppOrder(items, customerName) {\n    let language = arguments.length > 2 && arguments[2] !== void 0 ? arguments[2] : 'es';\n    const message = buildWhatsAppMessage(items, customerName, language);\n    const encoded = encodeURIComponent(message);\n    const url = \"https://wa.me/50585639999?text=\".concat(encoded);\n    window.open(url, \"_blank\", \"noopener,noreferrer\");\n}\n\n\n;\n    // Wrapped in an IIFE to avoid polluting the global scope\n    ;\n    (function () {\n        var _a, _b;\n        // Legacy CSS implementations will `eval` browser code in a Node.js context\n        // to extract CSS. For backwards compatibility, we need to check we're in a\n        // browser context before continuing.\n        if (typeof self !== 'undefined' &&\n            // AMP / No-JS mode does not inject these helpers:\n            '$RefreshHelpers$' in self) {\n            // @ts-ignore __webpack_module__ is global\n            var currentExports = module.exports;\n            // @ts-ignore __webpack_module__ is global\n            var prevSignature = (_b = (_a = module.hot.data) === null || _a === void 0 ? void 0 : _a.prevSignature) !== null && _b !== void 0 ? _b : null;\n            // This cannot happen in MainTemplate because the exports mismatch between\n            // templating and execution.\n            self.$RefreshHelpers$.registerExportsForReactRefresh(currentExports, module.id);\n            // A module can be accepted automatically based on its exports, e.g. when\n            // it is a Refresh Boundary.\n            if (self.$RefreshHelpers$.isReactRefreshBoundary(currentExports)) {\n                // Save the previous exports signature on update so we can compare the boundary\n                // signatures. We avoid saving exports themselves since it causes memory leaks (https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/53797)\n                module.hot.dispose(function (data) {\n                    data.prevSignature =\n                        self.$RefreshHelpers$.getRefreshBoundarySignature(currentExports);\n                });\n                // Unconditionally accept an update to this module, we'll check if it's\n                // still a Refresh Boundary later.\n                // @ts-ignore importMeta is replaced in the loader\n                module.hot.accept();\n                // This field is set when the previous version of this module was a\n                // Refresh Boundary, letting us know we need to check for invalidation or\n                // enqueue an update.\n                if (prevSignature !== null) {\n                    // A boundary can become ineligible if its exports are incompatible\n                    // with the previous exports.\n                    //\n                    // For example, if you add/remove/change exports, we'll want to\n                    // re-execute the importing modules, and force those components to\n                    // re-render. Similarly, if you convert a class component to a\n                    // function, we want to invalidate the boundary.\n                    if (self.$RefreshHelpers$.shouldInvalidateReactRefreshBoundary(prevSignature, self.$RefreshHelpers$.getRefreshBoundarySignature(currentExports))) {\n                        module.hot.invalidate();\n                    }\n                    else {\n                        self.$RefreshHelpers$.scheduleUpdate();\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            else {\n                // Since we just executed the code for the module, it's possible that the\n                // new exports made it ineligible for being a boundary.\n                // We only care about the case when we were _previously_ a boundary,\n                // because we already accepted this update (accidental side effect).\n                var isNoLongerABoundary = prevSignature !== null;\n                if (isNoLongerABoundary) {\n                    module.hot.invalidate();\n                }\n            }\n        }\n    })();\n//# sourceURL=[module]\n//# sourceMappingURL=data:application/json;charset=utf-8;base64,\n//# sourceURL=webpack-internal:///(app-pages-browser)/./utils/buildWhatsAppMessage.ts\n"));
